title: Review: broadside 2026-07-18 pass2
description:
Review confidence: 15% chance of missed bug.
Least confident areas: signatures.rs interaction with the new contentMap/quoteUrl fields (not reviewed this pass); feed.rs SSRF on enclosure URLs (process_remote is trusted but mime-type check allows extension-based bypass); db.rs migration sequencing for installs that had schema_meta from a prior version with different numbering.
Would raise confidence if: integration test that exercises card fetch with reversed-attribute OG tags; test for detect_quote_links with an <a>-wrapped AP URL.
close_reason: All 22 findings addressed. 16 fixed, 3 duplicates, 2 accepted with ponytail, 1 already handled. All 16 tests passing.
